notes: IOCs for use by the companion tool `job-scam-detector`. Clonesafe itself does not use this file directly.
Be extremely careful about additions here. Only include handles/emails/domains with strong, citable evidence and ideally only after public attribution (FBI seizures, CISA advisories, news reports).
Never add an entry based on a single victim's report — require corroboration.
Do NOT add real people's names even if suspicious; use only handles, emails, and domain-level identifiers.
Consider GDPR Article 9 (biometric data) and Polish art. 212 KK (criminal libel) before adding any personal identifier.
